name: io.github.mohantyajitesh/fusion-hcm-mcp-server
title: HCM MCP Server for Oracle Fusion Cloud (unofficial)
description: Open-source, write-capable MCP server for Oracle Fusion HCM. Safe by default. Unofficial.

environmentVariables.name: HCM_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Oracle Fusion pod base URL, e.g. https://your-pod.fa.us6.oraclecloud.com

environmentVariables.name: HCM_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Fusion integration user (least-privilege, read-only HCM roles recommended)

environmentVariables.name: HCM_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Integration user password (basic auth). Alternatively store in the OS credential store under service 'fusion-hcm-mcp-server' and omit this.

environmentVariables.name: CONFIG_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a config.toml for advanced settings (modules, feature flags, OAuth2, limits). Env vars override file values.
